Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS PROGRESS INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT COMPANY and TRINET HR CORPORATION'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
